name: coTfsTimingSDOPollDevice
title: coTfsTimingSDOPollDevice
description: This function is replaced by coTfsMonitorActivate and coTfsMonitorDeactivate.
tables: Obsolete Function This function is replaced by coTfsMonitorActivate and coTfsMonitorDeactivate.
long coTfsTimingSDOPollDevice( dword index, dword subIndex, dword retryNumber );

The functions monitors the average response times of a SDO access on a device. Test flow The functions executes a SDO Upload on the specified object for retryNumber times. The statistics of the selected node are reset at the beginning of the test. The received data are not compared, only the data size must be identical. Test result Minimum, maximum and average value of the SDO response time are added to the test protocol. The read values are not representative for all objects.
Example coTfsTimingSDOPollDevice( 0x1000, 0x1, 50 ); // run timing test on index 0x1000
